description: English text (Current Chinese Braille convention for embedded English): the first letter of a word carries a case sign, the rest are bare. Inside a running English stretch the lowercase sign в ° is dropped on following lowercase words вЂ” it only announces 'a Latin letter starts here', redundant once English is already underway вЂ” so a whole sentence shows it at most once. The capital sign keeps emitting per word because it carries case (World vs world).

single_letter.description: Single letter вЂ” sign + letter (2 cells)

lower_word.description: Lowercase word вЂ” one lowercase sign + bare letters

mixed_case.description: Mixed case вЂ” the first letter's case picks the sign, subsequent letters are bare

cases.note: two capitalized words вЂ” the capital sign is per-word (it carries case), so World keeps its в

acronym.description: All-caps acronym вЂ” whole-word capitals double the upper sign (в  в  ) + bare letters; a single в   means only the first letter is capital

cases.expected: в  в  в Ґв Ћв ѓ
в  в  в “в ћв ћв Џ

running_english.description: A running stretch of English: the lowercase sign в ° appears at most once (on the first word, and only if it's lowercase), then following lowercase words run bare. Spaces, punctuation and digits don't break the run; Chinese does. Capitals keep their per-word sign throughout.

cases.note: sign once on hello; world runs bare
capital opens the run; world bare

cases.note: whole sentence: one capital sign up front, no signs after

cases.note: the takes в °; CPU keeps its doubled capital sign; is / fast run bare

cases.expected: в °в Ѓв ѓв ‰в Ђв јв Ѓв ѓв ‰в Ђв ™в ‘в ‹
cases.note: the digit run (в јвЂ¦) carries the English context across; def runs bare

dotted_abbrev.description: Abbreviation with periods. The period carries the English run (it doesn't break it), so only the first letter takes the lowercase sign and the second runs bare. An English '.' is followed by one blank.

cases.expected: в °в Љв Ів Ђв ‘в Ів Ђ
cases.note: i takes в °; the period carries the run; e runs bare; each period adds a blank
e takes в °; g runs bare after the carrying period
